name: gemma-bulk-rnaseq-review-demo
description: A review-safe Gemma 4 bulk RNA-seq demo with a lightweight web UI and OpenAI-compatible local model integration.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n llm,api,web -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm --filter @gemma-demo/llm-engine dev" "pnpm --filter @gemma-demo/api dev" "pnpm --filter @gemma-demo/web dev"
scripts.check: pnpm build && pnpm test && bash scripts/package-submission.sh && cd .review-data/submission/XR-Gemma4-Agent && bash scripts/check-review-package.sh
